headlines.description: Reigning champions Bayer Leverkusen needed a stoppage-time goal from substitute Emiliano Buendia to snatch a 1-0 win over hosts Heidenheim on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen score late to keep title hopes alive

video.headline: Emiliano Buendía finds the back of the net for Bayer Leverkusen

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Emiliano Buendía finds the back of the net for Bayer Leverkusen) 2025/04/05 ESHEET

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund crushed Freiburg 4-1 in the Bundesliga on Saturday to climb into eighth spot as the Ruhr valley club chase Champions League spot.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund crush Freiburg in hunt for top four finish

video.headline: Karim Adeyemi gets on the scoresheet for Borussia Dortmund

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Karim Adeyemi gets on the scoresheet for Borussia Dortmund) 2025/04/05 ESHEET
